_publications._publicationTitle: Graph complexity analysis identifies an ETV5 tumor-specific network in human and murine low-grade glioma.

_contextSnippet: Etv5 2.74 3.54 2.40 2.07... In each of the murine Nf1 OPG models, we observed increased Etv5 RNA expression
details: Shows 3.54-fold increased Etv5 expression, the highest among all optic glioma models tested
